California launch hub

Covered California jurisdictions

This hub gives search traffic a clear, crawlable path into PermitPulse jurisdiction coverage pages. Each link is an indexable public page built for real permit research, not thin doorway copy.

Request Permit History + Risk Report Open California permit search
10 Launch jurisdiction pages
5 Pages tied to live public datasets
5 Portal-assisted launch pages
Jurisdiction pages

Crawlable launch coverage for California search intent

Every card below links to a public PermitPulse jurisdiction page with a canonical URL, an official portal link, coverage notes, and a direct CTA for Permit History + Risk Report requests.

Live search

Los Angeles

City permit coverage for LADBS addresses, permit numbers, valuation, and high-signal scope language.

Open page Official portal
Portal-assisted

Los Angeles County

County-served address routing, EPIC-LA case history, and support for mixed city-versus-county permit questions.

Open page Official portal
Live search

Sacramento

City of Sacramento permit coverage for issued records, valuation checks, and higher-value project triage.

Open page Official portal
Live search

Santa Monica

Santa Monica permit coverage for issued records, reroofs, remodels, and digital plan review workflows.

Open page Official portal
Live search

Culver City

Culver City permit coverage for building and MEP records, status review, and permit-history triage.

Open page Official portal
Live search

Beverly Hills

Beverly Hills permit coverage for issued permit records, valuation, and scope signals on higher-visibility projects.

Open page Official portal
Portal-assisted

Pasadena

Portal-assisted Pasadena permit coverage for address research, permit routing, and report requests.

Open page Official portal
Portal-assisted

Glendale

Portal-assisted Glendale coverage for permit routing, status checks, and report requests tied to a specific address.

Open page Official portal
Portal-assisted

Long Beach

Long Beach permit coverage for portal-first research, online permitting workflows, and report requests.

Open page Official portal
Portal-assisted

San Diego

Portal-assisted San Diego coverage for city permit lookup, record triage, and report requests.

Open page Official portal
Internal linking

Need statewide search instead of a single jurisdiction page?

Use the California permit history search to scan supported public datasets, then come back to the jurisdiction pages when you need a more local landing page or a report request path.

Designed in Los Angeles. Built for trades, diligence teams, and owners who need permit clarity before they commit.
